message:
feat(daemon): add orphan DB and backup freshness health checks (hq-rjh)

Extends DoltServerManager health checks with two new probes:
- checkDatabaseCount: warns if >10 databases detected (orphan accumulation)
- checkBackupFreshness: warns if any backup is >2h stale

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
